title: aira minoricensis
intro: Aira minoricensis, also known as Minorica wildrye, is a type of grass native to the island of Minorca in the Mediterranean. Its medicinal properties lie in its high concentration of essential oils, particularly pinene and borneol, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aira minoricensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Aira minoricensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
